Create a new REST API endpoint for a microservice handling with the given resource name.  
- Use domain-driven design: define a controller, service, etc layers.  
- Request & response JSON should follow our naming conventions (camelCase).  
- Validate input data, apply error handling.  
- Add unit-test skeleton for service layer.
- implement CRUD operations for the resource.
- Use appropriate HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) and status codes.
- Ensure the endpoint is secure (e.g., authentication, authorization).
